title: exacum viscosum
intro: Exacum viscosum, also known as sticky gentian or sticky exacum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Exacum viscosum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, and its herbal preparations are commonly found in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
